result.reason: RDP ActiveX control suppresses the Windows keyboard/language indicator during a session and does not restore it on disconnect, leaving the taskbar language bar hidden after closing.
result.approach: In the RDP disconnect/closed event handler, post WM_INPUTLANGCHANGEREQUEST or call ActivateKeyboardLayout(GetKeyboardLayout(0), KLF_SETFORPROCESS) via P/Invoke to force Windows to refresh the language bar indicator after the RDP control releases keyboard focus.
